description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, wide profile and a robust, angular body. It features a large central turret equipped with a prominent cannon, flanked by two smaller side-mounted guns and several missile or rocket launchers on both sides. The vehicle rides on a set of six visible tank treads, providing stability and traction for urban or rugged environments. The front is reinforced with a sloped armored plate, and the sides display the number '18' and a circular insignia. Additional details include exhaust pipes, hatches, and a visible shell or missile mounted at the rear. The overall finish is matte dark green with subtle weathering, giving it a utilitarian and battle-ready appearance.
description: A heavily armored, matte green combat vehicle with a central turret, multiple weapon mounts, and tank treads, marked with the number '18' and military insignia.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, sloped armored plate, and tank treads, emphasizing the vehicle's reinforced frontal armor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the turret, side-mounted guns, missile launcher, exhaust pipes, and the '18' marking with insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back-mounted missile or shell, exhaust pipes, and the rear armor structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, side weapons, missile launcher, and additional exhaust pipes.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large central turret cannon, two side-mounted guns (one per side), and two missile/rocket launchers (one per side), plus a visible shell or missile at the rear.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and reinforced panels on the front, sides, and rear; appears thick and robust, with angular design for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte dark green with subtle weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White number '18' and a circular insignia on both sides of the turret.
